response.global_analysis: 1. Audio Match: Vocal execution matched the reference lyrics perfectly. 2. Reference Usage: Guided song transcription, adjusted for cover deviations. 3. Timing: Synchronized precisely to vocals, adding on-screen credits.

subtitles.original: Can you hear me when I cry in desperation?
subtitles.english: Can you hear me when I cry in desperation?

subtitles.english: Nothing comes along with my expectation

subtitles.original: How much pain and ache you’re feeling?
subtitles.english: How much pain and ache you’re feeling?

subtitles.english: Breathing?

subtitles.english: I gotta change this situation

subtitles.original: アダルトスーツ
subtitles.english: Adult Suit

subtitles.original: アダルトなキグルミ着てる僕
subtitles.english: I'm wearing an adult costume

subtitles.original: 心はいつも不安定 天秤シーソー
subtitles.english: My heart is always unstable, like a seesaw

subtitles.original: まさかの発言で凍り付かす
subtitles.english: An unexpected remark freezes everything

subtitles.original: 色見え隠れ
subtitles.english: My true colors peek out

subtitles.original: 血迷うボク
subtitles.english: Losing my mind

subtitles.original: 今日の今この瞬間に放とうとする
subtitles.english: The words I try to speak

subtitles.original: 言葉がいつも後ろ髪引く
subtitles.english: at this very moment always pull me back

subtitles.original: 全部ダメダメ なんてでしょ？ じゃあもう放棄して！
subtitles.english: Everything is no good, right? Then just give it up!

subtitles.original: ハナから無かった事にしよ！！
subtitles.english: Let's pretend it never happened from the start!!

subtitles.original: ラリるラリラリラ
subtitles.english: Rari ru rari rari ra

subtitles.original: それじゃダメダメ 悪いクセだね！ もうしない！
subtitles.english: That's no good, that's a bad habit! I won't do it anymore!

subtitles.original: どうせ着せられているならキメキメでいこう！
subtitles.english: If I'm being forced to wear it, let's dress to kill!

subtitles.original: 何もかもが暗く黒く見える！
subtitles.english: Everything looks dark and black!

subtitles.original: 色メガネ付きの
subtitles.english: Through tinted glasses

subtitles.original: アダルトなパチモンスーツ
subtitles.english: wearing an adult knock-off suit

subtitles.original: 必殺技×0で全部消し去ろうか？ 強気なボク
subtitles.english: Should I erase it all with special move x 0? Confident me

subtitles.original: だけど実際はやっぱり出来やしないの
subtitles.english: But in reality, I can't do it after all

subtitles.original: 身軽さを奪われ動けない
subtitles.english: Stripped of my agility, I can't move

subtitles.original: それでうまいことバランスとれてるんだよ！
subtitles.english: That's how we keep a good balance!

subtitles.original: きみは耳元でそれを言う！
subtitles.english: You whisper that in my ear!

subtitles.original: それにしちゃ少しあんまりじゃない？
subtitles.english: But isn't that a little too much?

subtitles.original: っていうか不公平じゃない？
subtitles.english: Or rather, isn't it unfair?

subtitles.original: どうせ勝ち目なんてないし
subtitles.english: Since there's no chance of winning anyway,

subtitles.original: 食い気味でいこう！
subtitles.english: let's jump right into it!

subtitles.original: I feel this moment
subtitles.english: I feel this moment

subtitles.original: No one can take it
subtitles.english: No one can take it

subtitles.original: そう 何回だって 伝わらなけりゃ 意味無い！
subtitles.english: Yeah, no matter how many times, if it doesn't get through, it's meaningless!

subtitles.original: 今日の今この瞬間が大事なの！
subtitles.english: This moment, right now, is what matters!

subtitles.original: 奪う権利はあなた方にはない！！
subtitles.english: You have no right to take it away!!

subtitles.original: 全部ダメダメ！ 何がダメダメ？ なんでしょう？
subtitles.english: Everything is no good! What's no good? Tell me!

subtitles.original: 納得いくまで話してよ！
subtitles.english: Talk to me until I'm satisfied!

subtitles.original: どうせ屁理屈並べるんだろ？ バカみたい
subtitles.english: You'll just make excuses anyway, it's pathetic

subtitles.original: とどめをさす気でいるなら？
subtitles.english: If you intend to finish me off,

subtitles.original: 今がチャンスだぞ！
subtitles.english: now is your chance!

subtitles.original: はーい！ということで、常闇トワ6周年記念LIVEにお越しいただきありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Hi! So, thank you so much for coming to the Tokoyami Towa 6th Anniversary Live!

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、なんと本日6周年を迎えました！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yes! And so, we have reached our 6th anniversary today! Yay!

subtitles.original: ろ、ろく？ 悪魔の数字「6」？
subtitles.english: S-Six? The devil's number '6'?

subtitles.original: ということは今年はトワちゃんの年ということでいいでしょうか？ま、良くないか。いいか！
subtitles.english: So, is it safe to say this is Towa-chan's year? Well, maybe not... It's fine!

subtitles.original: ま、人によってはトワちゃんの、ね、あの、年にしちゃっていいということで！
subtitles.english: Well, for some of you, you can make it Towa-chan's year!

subtitles.original: はい、よろしくお願いします。ということで本日のハッシュ...
subtitles.english: Yes, I appreciate your support. So, today's hash...
